meaning: n.骞冲簳鐨勫皬娓旇埞,娴烽矀
examples: Dory: Hey! Have you seen an orange fish swim by? It looks just like him!
Dory: This way! He went this way! Quick! (to the crabs) Hey! Hey, hey! Hey!
Dory was assigned to work on a waste-management project in a Dominican migrant farm worker community.
Thus, as long as the slowdown is only a temporary thing, everything should be hunky dory.
